meta_description: A music and mental health nonprofit. We help people use music to take care of their mental health, with young people at heart.
hero_subheading: A music and mental health nonprofit. For everyone, with young people at heart.

crisis_line.name: 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline
crisis_line.intro: If you or someone you know is struggling with depression or thoughts of suicide, speak with someone now.
crisis_line.action: Call or text 988 or chat at 988lifeline.org

copyright: Sounds of Saving LLC. All Rights Reserved.

seo.home: A 501c3 nonprofit fueling hope through music. We work with artists to tell the stories of how music and mental health care can save and improve lives.
seo.programs: Sounds of Saving programs connect music, youth culture, and mental wellness through artist partnerships, school programs, and community events.
seo.about: Our approach: telling the stories of how music and mental health care can save and improve lives, in partnership with artists and young people.
seo.resources: Get help now. Mental health resources, crisis support, and local services curated by Sounds of Saving.
